title: [Bug]: Build fails on macOS — same as issue #50
body: I'm hitting the exact same problem as in #50. The error message is identical, the macOS version is the same (14.4 → 14.5 minor diff but the failure mode is unchanged). Filing a new issue because that one was closed but the fix didn't seem to take in my case. Reproduction: build any ESP32-S3 project from a fresh checkout, get linker error in cmake step.
